news.t: 10 Best Value ETFs to Buy for Bundled Bargains

holdings.infoBox: QVMT is an equity ETF with a total of 103 individual holdings. The top holdings are Johnson & Johnson stock at 4.63%, Apple at 4.37%, Intel at 4.26%, Lam Research at 4.22%, and Berkshire Hathaway at 4.17%.

overview.description: The Invesco S&P 500 Concentrated QVM ETF (QVMT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund tracks an index of 100 S&P 500 components, selected and weighted based on a multi-factor approach. QVMT was launched on Oct 9, 2015 and is issued by Invesco.
infoTable: S&P 500 Quality, Value & Momentum Multi-factor Index

data.title: 10 Best Value ETFs to Buy for Bundled Bargains
data.text: Value stocks are finally having their day, and many expect the run to continue. These are the best value ETFs to leverage this long-awaited revival.
